product: Databricks SQL alerts are now generally available
tagline: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts is now generally available.
what_it_does: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts is now generally available. SQL alerts let you monitor data and KPIs by running a query on a schedule, evaluating a condition, and notifying recipients when the condition is met. Use SQL alerts to monitor KPI drifts, detect anomalies, and surface data quality issues.
why_it_matters: Use them to track business KPIs, monitor data quality, watch cost trends, and catch operational issues across your Databricks workloads.

capabilities.title: Walk through the alert editor
capabilities.desc: Walk through the alert editor end-to-end. Includes advanced settings and notification template customization.

capabilities.title: Find alerts on the listing
capabilities.desc: Find alerts on the listing page, share them, transfer ownership, and track changes with Databricks Git folders.

key_takeaway: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts is now generally available.
